title: Real Python Office Hours
content: Join us live for the next members-only Q&A session with the Real Python Team! You’ll meet fellow Pythonistas to chat about your learning progress, ask questions, and discuss Python tips & tricks via screen sharing. Just click the “register” button below. And in between meetings, come hang out with the hosts and fellow attendees in the #office-hours channel in ourSlack Community Chat! You can use Slack to share code snippets you’d like to discuss during the live session. Check ourCommunity Chat guideto learn how. Office Hours (Live) Wed, Jun 3 @ 14:00 UTC (1 hour) When:Wednesday, June 3 from 9:00am–10:00am US Central (14:00–15:00 UTC) Hosted by:Experts from the Real Python Team Topic:Open Q&A Office Hours are for members only. Not a member yet? Already have an account?Sign-in » Real Python is driven by our community. To keep it a great place to learn and hang out, we ask that members: What are Office Hours?Show/Hide Office Hours is a weekly Zoom-based online hangout with experts from the Real Python Team, where you can get help and discuss your Python questions with us and other community members. Check out ourOffice Hours announcement postto learn more. If you want to join, you can register at the link above to get a Zoom link. How do I join?Show/Hide Office Hours are available to all Real Python Members. Just click the button above underUpcoming Eventswhere you can sign up for the next event. How often can I participate?Show/Hide As often as you want! We have several regulars that come every week! Do I have to say anything or turn on my camera?Show/Hide No, you’re more than welcome to join even if you just want to listen and leave your camera and microphone turned off. If you have a question you can ask it via Zoom’s text-based chat or post it in the#office-hourschannel in theRP Community Slack. I missed the session, are there recordings?Show/Hide Office Hours sessions are currentlynot recorded. We stopped recording so participants can speak freely and ask anything without hesitation. What’s discussed won’t leave the current session, except that we can choose to continue a discussion in the #office-hours Slack channel. Come and join us live to be there and participate! If you’re curious, there are some older recordings in theOffice Hours Archivethat you can check out to get an idea of what Office Hours sessions are like, but it’s even better to just drop by. We’re a welcoming bunch and are looking forward to seeing you there :) Was this page helpful? Share your feedback
